behavioral_evals.statement: Builder captures ≥2 ideas per day via Discord, averaged over a week
behavioral_evals.success_criteria: 6 of 7 days meet the 2-idea threshold for 2 consecutive weeks

negative_cases.statement: Ideas go into the void — captured but <50% receive an enrichment thread within 1 hour

behavioral_evals.statement: Builder voluntarily extends enrichment threads beyond the system's initial questions, averaging ≥5 total exchanges per idea
behavioral_evals.success_criteria: 70% of enrichment threads reach ≥5 exchanges for 2 consecutive weeks

negative_cases.statement: Scattered, no story — enrichment threads complete but <30% of graduated hypotheses reference the workstream's goal.md direction

behavioral_evals.statement: Experiment results trigger new idea capture — builder logs ≥1 new idea within 4 hours of reviewing results, on days when experiments ran
behavioral_evals.success_criteria: 60% of experiment-run days produce a follow-on idea for 2 consecutive weeks

negative_cases.statement: Agent hallucinated the fix — experiment ships but builder marks it 'wouldn't care if reverted' during evening review

behavioral_evals.statement: Builder clicks through to the product AND provides qualitative feedback on ≥70% of experiment results during evening review
behavioral_evals.success_criteria: 70% of experiment results get both a click-through and feedback for 2 consecutive weeks

primary.name: Idea-to-experiment latency
primary.jtbd_link: Capture ideas instantly + Enrich through conversation

guardrails.statement: Eval definitions must exist in exactly one place (evals.md / evals.json). goal.md, CLAUDE.md, and ideas-backlog.md must never contain eval targets, measurements, or scoring formulas.
guardrails.fail_condition: Any eval metric, target, or measurement formula found in goal.md or CLAUDE.md

guardrails.statement: Every shipped experiment must be revertable from the dashboard with a single click. Granular revert per-change must be available. Revert triggers Claude Code.
guardrails.fail_condition: An experiment exists in the dashboard without a working revert action, OR revert requires terminal access
